name: Academorix
description: Academorix — the operating system for modern academies. Manage athletes, teams, sessions, matches, payments, and safeguarding in one command center.

usage.isotipo: Use the compact symbol-only isotype in constrained contexts such as collapsed sidebars, mobile headers, and app icons.
usage.logotipo: Use the complete wordmark/logotype in expanded sidebars, full headers, and brand bars.
